notes:
Tab bar rebuild — browser-style tabs that merge into the page (Tab-Bar spec v0.5).

**New**

- The **active tab now merges into the content** below it — no divider line — so
  the open note reads as one surface, like a browser tab. Inactive tabs keep a
  subtle separating line.

**Fixes & polish**

- Tabs, back/forward, the new-tab ＋, the calendar and the references toggle are
  now all aligned on a single line; tidier rounded tabs with an always-visible
  close ×, and a cleaner right-side cluster (calendar · divider · references).
- Slightly larger tab labels, on the same +1 text scale as the sidebar.
